papers.title_en: Reliable Multi-Prototypical Contrastive Learning for Semi-supervised Heterogeneous and Multi-organ Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对异构医疗图像中多器官分割标注稀缺的问题，提出了一种可靠的多原型对比学习框架。该方法在半监督学习背景下，通过引入多原型机制来捕捉复杂的解剖特征分布，并结合对比学习增强特征的判别性。实验证明，该方法能有效利用未标注数据，显著提升异构数据环境下的分割精度，为临床手术导航提供了重要的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate multi-organ segmentation across heterogeneous medical images is pivotalfor real-world surgical navigation. The scarcity of annotation constitutes a well-established consensus in the field, prompting semi-supervised learning to emerge as …

papers.title_en: Refine Then Fusion: Robust 3D Brain MRI Synthesis via Vision–Language Collaboration
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为“先细化后融合”的视觉-语言协作框架，旨在通过临床元数据引导实现稳健的跨模态3D脑部MRI合成。该方法通过整合视觉特征与语言描述，有效解决了现有合成技术在复杂临床场景下鲁棒性不足的问题，显著提升了合成图像的质量，为增强临床影像灵活性提供了重要技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Metadata-guided cross-modality 3D MRI synthesis aims to generate target-contrastvolumes from source-modality data conditioned on clinically available metadata,which is important for enhancing clinical imaging flexibility. However, existing …

papers.title_en: WAS-Mamba: 3D Medical Image Segmentation via Windowed Attention State Space Model
papers.tldr: WAS-Mamba 是一种针对 3D 医学图像分割的新型架构，旨在解决传统 Mamba 模型在处理复杂空间关系时的局限性。它创新性地结合了窗口注意力机制与状态空间模型（SSM），通过窗口化扫描策略增强了局部特征提取能力，同时保持了线性计算复杂度。该方法在多个医学影像数据集上表现出色，为高效、精准的 3D 图像分割提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Mamba, the state space model (SSM), has attracted significant attention for its abilityto model long-range dependencies with linear complexity, achieving success inmedical image segmentation. However, the previous cross-scanning approach in …

papers.title_en: Plaque-Level Machine Learning Prediction of Intraplaque Hemorrhage in Carotid Arteries Using Computed Tomography Angiography
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在利用机器学习技术，通过颈动脉CT血管造影（CTA）影像预测斑块内出血（IPH）。针对HR-MR-VWI金标准普及性不足的问题，研究开发了斑块水平的预测模型。结果表明，该方法能有效识别高风险斑块，为缺血性中风的早期预警和临床决策提供了一种更易普及的无创评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background Carotid artery plaques, especially those with intraplaque hemorrhage(IPH), are significant contributors to ischemic stroke. Although high-resolutionmagnetic resonance vessel-wall imaging (HR-MR-VWI) is the gold standard for …

papers.title_en: LI-RADS TRA v2024 succeeds where RECIST and mRECIST fail: viability-based survival prediction in TACE-treated hepatocellular carcinoma
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估LI-RADS TRA v2024在经TACE治疗的肝细胞癌患者中的预后价值。通过对比RECIST和mRECIST标准，研究发现LI-RADS TRA v2024在预测患者生存期方面表现更佳。该算法通过识别肿瘤活力，弥补了传统标准在非放射治疗后预后评估中的不足，为临床提供了更精准的生存预测工具。
papers.abstract_en: Background Despite robust response assessment validation of Liver ImagingReporting and Data System Treatment Response Algorithm (LI-RADS TRA) version2024, a critical evidence gap exists for its prognostic value in non-radiation …

papers.title_en: ConfMamba-SAM: Structured State Space Modeling with Memory-Augmented Prompting for Automatic Brain Lesion Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对临床MRI和CT影像中微小病灶、低对比度及切片间不连续等导致的脑病灶分割难题，本文提出ConfMamba-SAM模型。该方法结合了结构化状态空间模型（Mamba）的长程建模能力与记忆增强提示机制，旨在提升分割的准确性与一致性，为自动化脑病灶分析提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate and consistent brain lesion segmentation from clinical MRI and CT volumesremains challenging due to microscale lesions, low contrast, anisotropic resolution,and interslice discontinuities. To address these issues, we propose ConfMamba …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对 Mamba 模型在生物医学领域自适应中性能与通用流畅度平衡的问题，提出了 BioMamba 模型。通过在生物医学文本上进行系统性的领域自适应训练，BioMamba 不仅显著提升了在生物医学自然语言处理任务中的表现，还成功保留了通用语言建模能力。该工作填补了 Mamba 架构在特定领域应用研究的空白，为开发高效的生物医学专用语言模型提供了重要的方法论支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background. Biomedical language models should improve performance onbiomedical text while retaining general-language-modeling fluency. For Mamba-based models, this trade-off has not been systematically studied across biomedical …

papers.title_en: GIFT: Guided Fine-Tuning and Transfer for Enhancing Instruction-Tuned Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出GIFT（引导式微调与迁移）框架，旨在优化预训练基座模型任务更新向指令微调模型的迁移过程。针对现有合并方法效果受限的问题，GIFT通过引导式微调机制，实现了更高效的知识传递。实验证明该方法在保留指令遵循能力的同时，显著提升了模型在特定任务上的表现，为指令微调模型的适配提供了新范式。
papers.abstract_en: A promising paradigm for adapting instruction-tuned language models is to learntask-specific updates on a pretrained base model and subsequently merge them intothe instruction-tuned model. However, existing approaches typically treat the …

papers.title_en: Implicit Representations of Grammaticality in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了预训练语言模型中语法性与似然性之间的关系。虽然语言模型通过最大化文本似然性进行训练，但其生成的文本具有高度语法性。研究通过分析模型的内部表示，揭示了模型如何隐式地编码语法规则并区分句子的合法性与出现概率，证明了模型在概率预测之外还掌握了深层的语法结构，为理解大模型的语言处理机制提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Grammaticality and likelihood are distinct notions in human language. Pretrainedlanguage models (LMs), which are probabilistic models of language fitted tomaximize corpus likelihood, generate grammatically well-formed text and …

papers.title_en: Beyond Fixed Benchmarks and Worst-Case Attacks: Dynamic Boundary Evaluation for Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前大语言模型评估中固定基准测试存在的局限性，指出其容易产生天花板或地板效应，从而掩盖模型间的真实差距。作者提出了一种动态边界评估方法，旨在寻找模型能力从成功转向失败的临界点。该方法通过动态调整测试难度，提供了比传统静态测试更具信息量的评估信号，为更精准地衡量和区分不同模型的性能提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) today rests on fixed benchmarks thatapply the same set of items to any model, producing ceiling and floor effects thatmask capability gaps. We argue that the most informative evaluation signal lies at the …

papers.title_en: Experience Sharing in Mutual Reinforcement Learning for Heterogeneous Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型强化学习后训练中的孤岛问题，提出了“相互强化学习”（MRL）框架。该框架允许具有不同参数规模、目标函数甚至不同分词器的异构模型在训练过程中实时交换经验。通过这种协同训练机制，模型能够相互借鉴学习路径，在保持各自独立性的同时显著提升训练效率和最终性能，为异构模型间的知识传递提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce Mutual Reinforcement Learning, a framework for concurrent RL post-training in which heterogeneous LLM policies exchange typed experience whilekeeping separate parameters, objectives, and tokenizers. The framework combines a …

papers.title_en: STARFlow2: Bridging Language Models and Normalizing Flows for Unified Multimodal Generation
papers.tldr: STARFlow2 提出了一种将语言模型（LM）与归一化流（Normalizing Flows）相结合的新框架，旨在实现统一的多模态生成。该研究针对现有模型在处理交错文本图像序列时的局限性，通过桥接离散文本标记与连续图像分布，提升了模型在理解、推理及生成多模态内容方面的能力，为构建通用的多模态生成系统提供了高效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deep generative models have advanced rapidly across text and vision, motivatingunified multimodal systems that can understand, reason over, and generateinterleaved text-image sequences. Most existing approaches combine …

papers.title_en: Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何通过优化数据多样性来提升大语言模型在强化学习（RL）阶段的表现。作者提出了一种“中期训练”（Mid-Training）方法，即在执行RL之前，先利用模型自身生成的多种推理路径数据进行训练。这种方法通过丰富解题思路的多样性，有效增强了模型处理复杂推理问题的能力，并提升了后续强化学习的效率。
papers.abstract_en: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models(LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL.In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely …

papers.title_en: Edit-Based Refinement for Parallel Masked Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对掩码扩散语言模型在并行生成多个 token 时性能大幅下降的问题，本文提出了一种基于编辑的细化方法。该方法通过对初步生成的文本进行迭代式的编辑和修正，有效缓解了并行解码带来的质量损失。实验证明，该方法在保持扩散模型高效生成特性的同时，显著提升了文本生成的准确性和连贯性，为高效语言建模提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Masked diffusion language models enable parallel token generation and offerimproved decoding efficiency over autoregressive models. However, theirperformance degrades significantly when generating multiple tokens simultaneously …

papers.title_en: Scratchpad Patching: Decoupling Compute from Patch Size in Byte-Level Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对字节级语言模型中计算量与分块大小耦合导致的效率瓶颈，提出了 Scratchpad Patching 方法。该方法通过引入暂存区机制，实现了计算过程与分块大小的解耦，使得模型在无需分词器的前提下，能够更灵活地分配计算资源。实验表明，该方法在提升处理效率的同时保持了优异的语言建模性能，为构建高效、灵活的无分词器模型提供了重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Tokenizer-free language models eliminate the tokenizer step of the languagemodeling pipeline by operating directly on bytes; patch-based variants furtheraggregate contiguous byte spans into patches for efficiency. However, the average …

papers.title_en: Principle-Guided Supervision for Interpretable Uncertainty in Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗图像分割中不确定性量化缺乏解释性的问题，提出了一种原则引导的监督框架。该方法通过引入领域先验原则来指导模型学习，将传统单一的标量不确定性转化为具有物理或临床意义的可解释图谱。实验证明，该方法在提升分割可靠性的同时，为高风险医疗决策提供了更具参考价值的解释信息，是增强医疗AI透明度的重要进展。
papers.abstract_en: Uncertainty quantification complements model predictions by characterizing theirreliability, which is essential for high-stakes decision making such as medical imagesegmentation. However, most existing methods reduce uncertainty to a scalar …

papers.title_en: Beyond Masks: The Case for Medical Image Parsing
papers.tldr: 过去十年医疗影像研究主要集中在生成体素级掩码以获取尺寸和体积，但这无法满足放射科医生撰写详细报告的需求。本文提出“医疗图像解析”概念，主张超越简单的分割任务，通过提取更丰富的结构化信息来模拟临床诊断过程。这一转变旨在弥合自动化工具与实际临床工作流之间的差距，为医疗AI提供更具解释力和实用性的输出。
papers.abstract_en: Medical imaging research has spent a decade getting very good at one thing:producing per-voxel masks. Masks tell us size, volume, and location, and a decadeof clinical infrastructure rests on those outputs. Yet the report a radiologist writes …

papers.title_en: A Comparative Analysis of CT Degradation for LDCT Nodule Classification using Radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌筛查中低剂量CT（LDCT）噪声高的问题，通过影像组学方法对比分析了不同CT降质模拟技术对肺结节分类的影响。研究探讨了如何通过模拟降质过程来提升模型在LDCT图像上的分类性能，为在保持低辐射剂量的同时提高诊断准确性提供了重要的技术参考和实验依据。
papers.abstract_en: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) is the standard modality for lung cancerscreening, known for its low radiation dose but high noise levels. While existingliterature focuses on denoising LDCT images, comparative research on simulating …

papers.title_en: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前大语言模型在驱动自主智能体（如编程或计算机操作）时存在的串行处理瓶颈，提出了“多流LLM”（Multi-Stream LLMs）架构。该方法通过并行化处理思维流、输入流和输出流，打破了传统模型的顺序执行限制。这一创新显著提升了模型在复杂任务中的响应速度和执行效率，为构建更高效的自主智能体系统提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked theirwidespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computeruse applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since …
